retry_reason: Not a wrapper — no refcount operation to retry. Errors from command failures are unrecoverable within this function.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to send HCI reset and optional LED shutdown commands, not to manage reference counts. kfree_skb calls are just freeing temporary skb buffers, not part of a refcount wrapper contract.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper — no refcount operation to retry. Errors from command failures are unrecoverable within this function.
